steps.title: Clear the fractions
steps.content:
Multiply each term by $156cx$ to get a quadratic equation.
$$156=cx^2+156x$$
$$cx^2+156x-156=0$$

steps.title: Set the discriminant to zero
steps.content:
A quadratic has exactly one real solution when its discriminant is $0$.
$$156^2-4(c)(-156)=0$$
$$24{,}336+624c=0$$
